title: Weak economic data in China weighs on sentiment
section_path: Weak economic data in China weighs on sentiment
section_path_text: Weak economic data in China weighs on sentiment
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Weak economic data in China weighed on sentiment across commodity markets. This was exacerbated by a stronger USD. Image reference: 1691532005917.png | assets/2023-08-09_weak-economic-data-in-china-weighs-on-sentiment_img_1691532005917_d46a0e6b3493.png
Copper fell after worse than expected trade data from China raised further concerns over the recovery of its economy.
